creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

The attached diff contains an update to the irc/bitlbee-otr port provided by 
this PR. The attached diff upgrades it to v. 1.2.3. I'm not sure about the 
availability of distfile, so it'll be great if it can be hosted somewhere more 
reliable place.

TiA
Ashish
